ref: The software should be used on a laptop computer
expl: Benar secara struktur: "S+V, and S+V" — kedua klausa lengkap dan dihubungkan FANBOYS "and" dengan koma yang tepat.
flagNote: Isi kalimat agak berputar/redundan secara makna ("this computer is a laptop"), tapi soal Structure TOEFL menilai gramatikal bukan logika isi. Sebaiknya dikonfirmasi ke pengajar.

ref: They are trying to sell their house
expl: Salah. Dua klausa lengkap ("they are trying..." dan "it has been...") hanya dihubungkan koma tanpa FANBOYS — comma splice. Seharusnya: "...their house, and it has been in the market..."

ref: So the quality of the print was not good
expl: Salah. FANBOYS "so" harus berada DI ANTARA dua klausa (S+V, so S+V), bukan di awal kalimat. Seharusnya: "The quality of the print was not good, so I changed the typewriter ribbon."

ref: The lifeguard will warn you about the riptides
expl: Benar. Pola "S+V, FANBOYS S+V" terpenuhi sempurna: dua klausa lengkap dihubungkan koma + "or".

ref: Since the bank closes in less than an hour
expl: Benar. Pola "Connector S+V, S+V": "Since" memimpin anak kalimat, diikuti koma, lalu klausa utama — sesuai aturan.

ref: Their backgrounds are thoroughly investigated
expl: Salah. Anak kalimat setelah "before" tidak punya subjek ("before are admitted..."). Seharusnya: "...before they are admitted to the organization."

ref: The citizens are becoming more and more incensed
expl: Benar. Pola "S+V Connector S+V": klausa utama lebih dulu, lalu "whenever" + anak kalimat, tanpa koma — sesuai aturan karena connector tidak memimpin kalimat.

ref: The ground had been prepared
expl: Salah. Dua klausa lengkap hanya dihubungkan koma tanpa FANBOYS — comma splice. Seharusnya tambahkan "and": "...had been prepared, and the seedlings were carefully planted."

ref: The commandant left strict orders about the passes
expl: Salah. Comma splice — dua klausa lengkap hanya dihubungkan koma. Seharusnya: "...about the passes, but several soldiers left the post anyway."

ref: No one is admitted to the academy
expl: Salah. Anak kalimat setelah "unless" tidak punya verb ("he or she the education requirements"). Seharusnya ada verb, mis. "...unless he or she meets the education requirements."

ref: While most students turned the assignment in on time
expl: Benar. Pola "Connector S+V, S+V": "While" memimpin anak kalimat, diikuti koma, lalu klausa utama — sesuai aturan.

ref: I will take you wherever need to go
expl: Salah. Anak kalimat setelah "wherever" tidak punya subjek ("wherever need to go"). Seharusnya: "...wherever you need to go..."

ref: The engine performed well during the test
expl: Kesalahan di "the designed" — seharusnya kata benda "the design" (bukan bentuk verb/participle "designed") karena posisi ini menjadi subjek klausa kedua: "...the design had a minor flaw."

ref: The manager reviewed the reports, and submitted
expl: Kesalahan pada koma sebelum "and". Ini bukan dua klausa independen, melainkan dua verb ("reviewed...and submitted...") dengan SATU subjek "the manager" (compound predicate) — tidak perlu koma. Seharusnya: "The manager reviewed the reports and submitted them to the director."

ref: The experiment was a success but the team
expl: Kesalahan: koma hilang sebelum FANBOYS "but". Pola "S+V, FANBOYS S+V" wajib pakai koma di depan FANBOYS. Seharusnya: "The experiment was a success, but the team still needed more data."

ref: He finished the report then he emailed it
expl: "Then" bukan FANBOYS dan tidak bisa menggabungkan dua klausa lengkap tanpa tanda baca yang tepat. Seharusnya pakai koma+and atau titik koma: "He finished the report, and then he emailed it to the team."

ref: We can start the conference now that
expl: Setelah connector "now that" dibutuhkan klausa lengkap dengan verb berkala (finite verb), tapi "the participants arriving" hanya participle tanpa auxiliary. Seharusnya: "...now that all the participants are arriving" atau "have arrived".

ref: As soon as the final whistle blew
expl: Pola "Connector S+V, S+V": koma wajib setelah anak kalimat "the final whistle blew" sebelum klausa utama. Koma tersebut hilang di kalimat ini. Seharusnya: "As soon as the final whistle blew, the crowd erupted in celebration."

ref: Many species are endangered ,because
expl: Pola "S+V Connector S+V" (klausa utama lebih dulu) TIDAK memakai koma sebelum connector, tapi di kalimat ini ada koma sebelum "because" yang seharusnya dihapus. Seharusnya: "Many species are endangered because their natural habitats are being destroyed rapidly."

ref: Since the evidence was inconclusive, so the judge
expl: Double connector: "Since" dan "so" dipakai bersamaan padahal cukup satu. Seharusnya salah satu saja, mis.: "Since the evidence was inconclusive, the judge couldn't make a final decision."

ref: The research was complex
expl: Butuh FANBOYS yang menyatakan kontras ("but") sekaligus subjek untuk klausa kedua ("it" = the research). "But it" memenuhi keduanya: "...complex, but it was ultimately successful." Pilihan lain kehilangan subjek atau konektor kontrasnya.

ref: While the chef was preparing the main course
expl: Setelah anak kalimat "While the chef was preparing..." + koma, dibutuhkan klausa utama yang lengkap (S+V). Hanya "the appetizers were served by the waiter" yang merupakan klausa lengkap (S=the appetizers, V=were served); pilihan lain berupa frasa gerund yang tidak gramatikal sebagai klausa utama.

ref: Plants require sunlight because
expl: Setelah connector "because" dibutuhkan klausa lengkap yang menjelaskan sebab secara logis. "They produce their own food" (S=they, V=produce) lengkap dan menjelaskan alasan tumbuhan butuh sinar matahari (untuk fotosintesis). "Producing food through photosynthesis" tidak punya subjek/verb berkala; "is producing their own food" tidak punya subjek.
flagNote: "Food production is vital" juga berupa klausa lengkap secara gramatikal — perlu konfirmasi pengajar opsi mana yang dimaksud sebagai kunci resmi.

ref: The team celebrated
expl: Hubungan sebab-akibat: menang (sebab) lalu merayakan (akibat). "Because" tepat menghubungkan akibat lebih dulu lalu sebabnya. "So" akan membalik logika; "Later"/"And" tidak menyatakan sebab.

ref: you finish your homework, you cannot watch television
expl: "Unless" (="if not") pas secara makna kondisional: jika TIDAK selesai mengerjakan PR, tidak boleh menonton TV. "While"/"Whereas" menyatakan kontras/waktu, bukan kondisi; "Because" menyatakan sebab, bukan syarat.
